title: Element View Plan
description: Planning and documentation record for element reference-view generation. Kling binding fields (kling_alias, speaker_mapping, etc.) belong in element_binding schema, not here. This record must never contain or modify pack_status, canon_lock, approved, locked, or selected lifecycle fields.

schema_version.description: Pre-1.0 draft. Promoted to 1.0 after B0/B1/B2 feedback loop closes.

element_id.description: Element identifier: C01, LOC001, PROP003, WD001, etc.

element_subtype.description: Optional qualifier: wardrobe_id for wardrobe-level plans (e.g., WD001), sub_area_id for location sub-areas (e.g., kitchen_passage).

element_context.description: Brief human-readable description of this element's production role and relevant scene context.

retrofit_status.description: historical: views already generated using legacy methods; independent_t2i is permitted for any view. planned: view plan authored but generation not yet started. active: generation currently in progress using anchor-then-refine. For planned/active records, independent_t2i is only permitted for the anchor view itself.

anchor_view.description: view_id of the anchor view (typically main_front, generated via anchor_t2i). Null when no anchor strategy applies — e.g., location plans, props without a natural identity anchor, or historical records where all views were independent_t2i.

views.description: Ordered list of element reference views. For anchor-then-refine workflow, the anchor view must appear before dependent views.

original_locked_at.description: Timestamp when element was originally locked. Populated for retrofit_status: historical records.

original_method_summary.description: For historical records: human-readable summary of how views were originally generated, including which models were used and whether anchor-then-refine was applied.

evidence_refs.description: Relative paths to supporting evidence files (e.g., image_selection.yaml, pack_manifest.yaml, intake_slot.yaml).

open_blockers.description: Known blockers preventing view generation or completion. Populated for planned/active records where source images or decisions are missing.

view_id.description: Stable identifier for this view slot (e.g., main_front, three_quarter_left, wide_establishing, skyline_photograph).

generation_pattern.description: anchor_t2i: T2I generation of the anchor view itself. anchor_refine_img2img: img2img refinement of a non-anchor view using anchor as input_reference (requires adapter to populate generation_params.input_reference). independent_t2i: standalone T2I with no anchor dependency — permitted for any view when retrofit_status is historical; permitted only for the anchor view itself in planned/active records.

anchor_dependency.description: required: this view must use anchor as input_reference (anchor_refine_img2img). optional: anchor reference is available but generation may proceed independently. none: no anchor relationship applies.

model_adapter_target.description: Stable internal model ID (e.g., midjourney_image_best_available, chatgpt_image_best_available, nano_banana_best_available). Never a hardcoded provider version name — adapters resolve the current version at runtime from model_guidance_snapshot.yaml.

canonical_asset_path.description: Relative path to the committed canonical asset for this view. Null if not yet generated or committed.

generation_notes.description: Human-readable notes about how this view was or will be generated — model used, prompt reference, relevant constraints.
